evals.prompt: How do I connect Apollo to Salesforce?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide for setting up Apollo-Salesforce CRM sync, including field mapping, sync direction, and common pitfalls

assertions.name: crm_sync_steps
assertions.description: Provides numbered steps to configure the Salesforce integration in Apollo Settings

assertions.name: field_mapping
assertions.description: Discusses field mapping and sync direction (Apollo→CRM, CRM→Apollo, bi-directional)

assertions.name: common_issues
assertions.description: Warns about common issues like duplicates and sync conflicts

evals.prompt: I'm burning through Apollo credits too fast. Help me figure out what's going on.
evals.expected_output: Credit usage diagnosis and optimization strategy, explaining what actions consume credits and how to reduce waste

assertions.name: credit_types
assertions.description: Explains different credit types (mobile, export, data, email) and what consumes each

assertions.name: optimization
assertions.description: Provides specific credit-saving strategies (enrich only qualified records, limit phone reveals, monitor usage)

assertions.name: usage_check
assertions.description: Directs user to Settings > Usage to review consumption patterns

evals.prompt: I want to use the Apollo API to auto-create contacts from our onboarding form. We're a Python/Flask app and when a new lead fills out the form, I want to automatically create a contact in Apollo with their name, email, company, and title. We'll probably be doing 50-100 contacts per day. How do I set this up?
evals.expected_output: API guidance for contact creation including endpoint, auth, and example payload, pointing to the API reference for details

assertions.name: api_reference
assertions.description: Points to references/apollo-api-reference.md for full API docs

assertions.name: endpoint
assertions.description: Identifies POST /contacts as the creation endpoint
